message:
✨ feat: add Providers section to sidebar tree (#10)

- New Providers section between Favorites and Groups
- Shows each provider with icon (bolt for xtream, playlist for m3u)
- Displays channel count per provider
- Clicking a provider filters to its channels only
- Add Provider action links to providers screen
- Also includes verbose mpv logging for audio debugging

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
